arts.ttl: Leny Yoro told he can be as good as two best-in-class Premier League defenders
arts.sum: The Frenchman is starting to come of age under Ruben Amorim

arts.ttl: Manchester United vs Fulham LIVE: FA Cup match stream, latest team news, lineups, TV, prediction
arts.sum: Premier League rivals go head to head at Old Trafford for a place in the quarter-finals

arts.ttl: Manchester United handed clear Bruno Fernandes decision after brutal Roy Keane criticism
arts.sum: Legendary former Man United captain Roy Keane has been highly critical of Bruno Fernades as the Reds continue to toil under Ruben Amorim

arts.ttl: Manchester United vs Fulham LIVE: FA Cup team news and line-ups as holders seek to progress to last eight
arts.sum: United are looking to salvage something from a hugely disappointing season as they battle for the FA Cup and Europa League

arts.ttl: How to watch Man Utd vs Fulham - TV channel, stream details, kick-off time, FA Cup VAR rules
arts.sum: Fulham will be looking to get revenge on Manchester United, who waltzed away victorious when the two sides met in the Premier League last month

arts.ttl: Manchester United confirmed squad members vs Fulham as Chido Obi update given
arts.sum: Man Utd take on Fulham in the fifth round of the FA Cup today and the players have arrived at Old Trafford.

arts.ttl: FA Cup rewind: Fulham's minute of madness against Man Utd
arts.sum: In 2023 Fulham "lose their heads" as they let slip a 1-0 lead and receive three red cards against Manchester United in their FA Cup quarter-final at Old Trafford. Willian is given a red card after a VAR check for a deliberate handball with striker Aleksander Mitrovic and manager Marco Silva also sent off in the aftermath. Bruno Fernandes converted the resulting penalty for Man Utd who would go on to win the match 3-1.

arts.ttl: ‘I had Man Utd trials but ended up at rivals for £8.5m - Pep Guardiola thinks I’m unreal'
arts.sum: Lucas Bergvall has been a standout star for Tottenham Hotspur and was praised by Manchester City boss Pep Guardiola, but the midfielder could've been a Manchester United player

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim defends Sir Jim Ratcliffe after mass Man Utd redundancies
arts.sum: Manchester United's cost-cutting measures have attracted widespread criticism and Ruben Amorim has also been in the firing line.

arts.ttl: Amorim: In-form Maguire deserves England recall
arts.sum: Harry Maguire deserves to be recalled to the England squad and his leadership qualities can be an asset to the national team, Manchester United manager Ruben Amorim said.
